message:
fix(runtime+sync): sharded state poison tolerance + once_cell pin projection

sharded_state.rs:
  Replace .expect("obligations lock poisoned") with
  .unwrap_or_else(PoisonError::into_inner) at all 6 obligations
  lock sites. A poisoned lock means a prior holder panicked, but
  the obligations data is still valid — panicking here would cascade
  a single thread's failure into the entire runtime. Recovery via
  into_inner preserves availability.

once_cell.rs:
  WaitInit::poll now uses self.get_mut() for direct field access
  instead of self.field through Pin<&mut Self>, matching the
  pin projection pattern applied across mutex/rwlock/semaphore
  in prior commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
